title: MCLN EX95 Active Palletization oLPNS Configuration Guide v1.1
fullText:
﻿ MCLN EX9 5 Active Palletization oLPNs Configuration Guide Table of Contents TOC \o "1-7" \z \u \h 1 GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL CODE SETUP PAGEREF _Toc1738561522 \h 2 1.1 Enable System Code C-000 PAGEREF _Toc42768798 \h 2 2 Add additional Custom Sytem Codes PAGEREF _Toc619406231 \h 4 2.1 C-000-EX95 Enablement PAGEREF _Toc1678665879 \h 4 2.2 C-E95-MAX Enablement PAGEREF _Toc354912476 \h 5 3 Add Transaction Parameters EX95 enablement PAGEREF _Toc2065813034 \h 7 GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL CODE SETUP Enable System Code C-000 Navigate to the System Codes (Configuration) UI. If system code C-000 (Global Extension Control) does not yet exist, click Add. Populate the following information: Note: The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is un-editable to the user. Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. Click ADD. Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen. System Code parameters Screen is displayed. Click ADD button. Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE. Click on the Parameters tab. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. Click SAVE. Add additiona l C ustom C odes 1. Navigate to System Codes UI in WM. We will need to add Custom code C-000-E X 95 if it has not been added. 2. Search for system code C-000: Use the Custom Code drop-down option under the Record Type menu. Type in 000 for Code Type. Click apply to search. 3. Click the Checkbox to select the system code. 4. Click on the Code ID's action button in the lower right of the menu. 5. Click ADD action button. 6. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above. 7. Click SAVE. C-000-EX 95 Enablement 1. Click the Blue Parameters Tab. 2. Located next to the DETAILS tab. 3. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. 4. CLICK SAVE. C-E95-MAX Enablement Open System Codes UI C lick Add. Populate the following information : NOTE: Code Description- *EX95 Max number of oLPNs per pallet* Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. Click ADD. NOTE: Code Description and Code ID description - *EX95 Max number of oLPNs per pallet* Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen System Code parameters Screen is displayed. Click ADD button. Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE. Click on the Parameters tab. Enter numeric value in Value edit box . Click SAVE. Add Transaction Parameters EX95 enablement Open Transaction Parameters UI, filter for the Transaction Name * Pltz oLPNs PCC* . Click on “ Pltz oLPNs PCC ” transaction and click on “Program Template” on the bottom right. Click “Add” Enter in the following informati o n so it looks like the image below. Hit “Save” Click Add Enter in the following informati o n so it looks like the image below. NOTE: Description - *EX95 Custom Tracking Screens* Hit "Save" Click Add E nter in the following informati o n so it looks like the image below. Confirm Pltz oLPNs PCC transaction ha s newly created parameters. Select Edit, check parameters, and save.

If system code C-000 (Global Extension Control) does not yet exist, click Add. Populate the following information: Note: The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is un-editable to the user. Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. Click ADD. Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen. System Code parameters Screen is displayed. Click ADD button. Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE. Click on the Parameters tab. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. Click SAVE. Add additiona l C ustom C odes 1. Navigate to System Codes UI in WM. We will need to add Custom code C-000-E X 95 if it has not been added. 2. Search for system code C-000: Use the Custom Code drop-down option under the Record Type menu. Type in 000 for Code Type. Click apply to search. 3. Click the Checkbox to select the system code. 4. Click on the Code ID's action button in the lower right of the menu. 5. Click ADD action button. 6. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above. 7. Click SAVE. C-000-EX 95 Enablement 1. Click the Blue Parameters Tab. 2. Located next to the DETAILS tab. 3. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. 4. CLICK SAVE. C-E95-MAX Enablement Open System Codes UI C lick Add. Populate the following information : NOTE: Code Description- *EX95 Max number of oLPNs per pallet* Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. Click ADD. NOTE: Code Description and Code ID description - *EX95 Max number of oLPNs per pallet* Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID.
